_comment: issue #210 區級資源包（urban）：一店一包、多類別共用同一都會 packStyle；既有素材沿用不重生（#196 三層描述詞之 itemDesc 全數保留，由原 5 包合併）。

packStyle.name: 都會服飾店 Urban Outfitter
packStyle.reference: pretty urban storybook fashion — dresses, puff-sleeve blouses, tidy bottoms, ribbon boots and dainty accessories

items.top-peach-sailor: a peach sailor top with a sailor collar
items.bottom-navy-shorts: a pair of navy story shorts
items.bottom-wild-shorts: a pair of earthy story shorts
items.bottom-plum-shorts: a pair of plum story shorts
items.bottom-cocoa-shorts: a pair of cocoa-brown story shorts
items.dress-blue-harbor: a blue harbor party dress with a fitted bodice and flared skirt
items.dress-rose-festival: a rose festival dress with a fitted bodice and flared skirt
items.dress-snowflake-gown: a white snowflake gown with a fitted bodice and long flared skirt
items.dress-mint-harbor: a mint harbor party dress with a fitted bodice and flared skirt
items.dress-lilac-harbor: a lilac harbor party dress with a fitted bodice and flared skirt
items.dress-pearl-harbor: a pearl-white harbor party dress with a fitted bodice and flared skirt
items.dress-lavender-festival: a lavender festival dress with a fitted bodice and flared skirt
items.shoes-pink-ribbon: a pair of pink ribbon ankle boots, shown from the front as worn standing upright, both boots side by side — do NOT show the soles or a top-down view
items.shoes-blue-boots: a pair of blue seaside ankle boots, shown from the front as worn standing upright, both boots side by side — do NOT show the soles or a top-down view
items.shoes-mint-ribbon: a pair of mint ribbon ankle boots, shown from the front as worn standing upright, both boots side by side — do NOT show the soles or a top-down view
items.shoes-lilac-ribbon: a pair of lilac ribbon ankle boots, shown from the front as worn standing upright, both boots side by side — do NOT show the soles or a top-down view
items.shoes-sun-ribbon: a pair of sunny-yellow ribbon ankle boots, shown from the front as worn standing upright, both boots side by side — do NOT show the soles or a top-down view
items.shoes-coral-ribbon: a pair of coral ribbon ankle boots, shown from the front as worn standing upright, both boots side by side — do NOT show the soles or a top-down view
items.headside-silk-ribbon: a silk party hair ribbon bow
items.headside-mint-ribbon: a mint party hair ribbon bow
items.faceeyes-round-glasses: a pair of round storybook glasses, front view
items.facemask-star-mask: a small lavender star-shaped decorative eye mask, front view
